final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire D,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
